task_description: Create the complete Anti-Stalker Intelligence System - a professional monitoring platform with AI-powered pattern detection (using local ML via scikit-learn, no external AI APIs), web dashboard, multi-layer detection, Telegram userbot/bot, Flask trap server, and automated deploy script following the existing teleexport deploy.sh pattern.

verification.summary: All dependencies install successfully. All 35 tests pass. All module imports work correctly. All .py files compile without errors. Deploy script passes bash -n syntax check with all 7 credential prompts validated. Docker build skipped (no Docker daemon in sandbox).
